features.title: Live Safety Agents
features.description: Connect instantly with trained safety agents who monitor your location and surroundings in real-time.
features.benefit: Someone is always there when you need them

features.title: Track Me On The Go
features.description: Share your real-time location with trusted contacts or safety agents as you travel.
features.benefit: Your loved ones always know where you are

features.title: One-Touch Activation
features.description: Get help immediately with a single button press. No complicated processes when seconds count.
features.benefit: Help arrives in seconds, not minutes

features.title: Audio Monitoring
features.description: Safety agents can hear your surroundings to assess situations and provide appropriate help.
features.benefit: Agents understand your situation without you saying a word

features.title: Emergency Response Coordination
features.description: When needed, we coordinate with local emergency services on your behalf.
features.benefit: Professional emergency coordination when it matters most

features.title: Family Circle Protection
features.description: Monitor and protect multiple family members with shared safety features.
features.benefit: Keep your whole family safe from one account

features.title: 24/7 Availability
features.description: Safety agents are available around the clock, every day of the year.

features.title: Discrete Protection
features.description: Get help without drawing attention. Silent alerts and discrete monitoring available.
features.benefit: Get help without escalating unsafe situations

useCases.title: Walking Alone at Night
useCases.description: Whether from work, a friend's house, or to your car - never walk alone in the dark again.

useCases.title: Business Travel
useCases.description: Stay safe in unfamiliar cities while meeting clients, partners, or exploring new locations.

useCases.title: College Students
useCases.description: Give parents peace of mind and students 24/7 protection on and off campus.

useCases.title: Late Night Shifts
useCases.description: Nurses, restaurant workers, and others leaving work at odd hours deserve safe commutes.

useCases.title: Public Transportation
useCases.description: Feel secure on buses, trains, and subways, especially during off-peak hours.

useCases.title: Real Estate Agents
useCases.description: Meeting strangers at unknown properties. Always have backup with you.

useCases.title: Running & Exercise
useCases.description: Stay focused on your workout, not your surroundings. We'll watch out for you.

useCases.title: Teenage Safety
useCases.description: Give teens independence while maintaining peace of mind for parents.

peace: Sleep better knowing your loved ones are protected
Stop worrying every time someone leaves the house late
Give your family the security they deserve
fear: Don't wait until something happens to take action
Every minute without protection is unnecessary risk
The statistics are real - take control of your safety now
Your current safety plan isn't enough - and you know it
